assertions.description: SSD1306 OLED module (Brd1) is on I2C bus (SCL/SDA pins connected to Arduino A4/A5) but I2C bus analysis only shows Arduino, not the OLED. The SSD1306 is typed as other rather than display/ic.
SK6812MINI LEDs use a serial data protocol (single-wire NZR) but no observation about addressable LED chains is generated
